Tserrina's Whip  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +8 AGI: +4
Effect: Muscle Lock I (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Tserrina's Whip
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +8 AGI: +4
Effect: Muscle Lock I (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 35
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Venom drips from its tip
Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Mool D'Mojo
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 09:48:43
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 51
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Tower of Frozen Shadow
NPC Name
Tserrina Syl`Tor


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Tower of Frozen Shadow
Dropped by Tserrina


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Not visible
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2008 at 2:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1696810595756
402 posts
In case anyone like me who was camping her was wondering, she doesn't visibly equip it when she has the whip.
▲ Page top
Clearify Some Things
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2004 at 5:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780881775
1,154 posts
From all I can tell this is a weak snare, and not a slow.

The duration of this is indeed greater than 3 minutes, but the duration gets heavily mitigated with resistant mobs. However, being a 65 Paladin, I used this to snare on 2 Hard Adventures.

The effect is weak, extrememly weak, compaired to most snares. I'm not sure what the problem is but the effect doesn't seem to be 40%, or even 30. In fact the only thing this is good for is stopping mobs from running. At 20% mobs that try to run do so extremely slowly (even with SoW or some innate running enhancement) and at 10% stop moving. Don't plan to use this to fear kite or anything like that, however.

As a 65 Paladin I can suggest this weapon, however, because it is basically the only snare weapon a Pally can wield. It is easily attainable Solo, and may result in some other neat toys (Bandaid Summon Dagger for one). Except for the library level its all quite entertaining, as well.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2002 at 12:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779797344
129 posts
Don't be put off by the poor ratio on this weapon... The proc has an incredible taunt on it and poisons/snares the target. The taunt is what makes this item useful for a tank: if you need it pissed at you, this is the item to use.
▲ Page top
Slow AND Snare
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2002 at 11:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754500652
7 posts
After using poisons with my rogue, and muscle lock being one of my favorites, I can tell you, this is both a snare and a slow. Muscle lock 1 has a duration of 40 sec.

From the safehouse, discussing this poison directly:
http://pub35.ezboard.com/fthesafehouselaboratory.showMessage?topicID=2329.topic

▲ Page top
Proc Effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2002 at 11:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592347907391
Scholar
56 posts
it is not a slow - it is a snare... here's the info:

Muscle Lock I
Adding 2 Poison counters
Decrease Movement between 31% (L1) to 40% (L10)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Instantaneous
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 50 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Poison

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: Unknown
Duration Formula: 2

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your legs spasm as poisons seeps into your veins.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso has been poisoned.
Spell fades: The poison has run its course.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 29 2001 at 12:53 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) almost POSITIVE this is also a haste debuff. I think I read that it snares and decreses the haste of the mob by like 70%
snare effect
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 10:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248621500
15 posts
The effect is a snare type, it slows down movement like snare. I found out with a friend when we duel'd. It decreased my movement when i tried to run around, but not as much as snare would. And when he did cast snare it overwrote the proc effect.

▲ Page top
RE: For rogues?
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2001 at 7:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758319357
8 posts
Have you ever thought of switching to piercing just for BSing? a buddy of mine did it for 44 lvls, he's got epic now and doesnt need to, but hey do what ya gotta do.
▲ Page top
RE: For rogues?
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2001 at 3:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755689526
115 posts
Much like my little halfling warrior can duel wield and still use a shield (heck, with a couple extra clicks, I can use a shield while 2handing, but I digress).

Keep your piercer or shield in an open inventory slot. Left-click and hold until that slot pops off onto your cursor. Place that slot onto one of your hotkey thingies. Do the same with your weapon slot (primary for a rogue that wants to switch out for a piercer, secondary for the small duel wielder that wants to bash, BOTH for the 2hander that wants to bach.) These slots work in hotkeys exactly as they would in their normal positions. Simply pick up one by left clicking it, and swap out. Easy. For 2handers, pick up the 2hander from the primary, swap it with the shield in inventory, place the shield in the secondary slot, hit the bash button, pick up the shield, drop it where the 2hander is, put the 2hander back in primary. Easy.

Not sure whether Verant would consider this an exploit, but I've never seen anyone get pegged for it. Now if I could only find a way to keep a halfling from getting stunned from the front, I'll be set.
▲ Page top

The Proc

# Dec 27 2000 at 2:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I gained this whip roughly a week ago from Tserrina when my guildmates and I slayed her. However, the proc has been said to be a snare from a line of rogue poisons. But at this time the proc is broken, and the GMs on at least Fennin Ro have been made aware of the situation. Basically it'll be another item fixed in a patch, and anyone who has it will have to trade it in for a fixed one.

__DEL__1591751638823

Although me have seen better damage/delay whips, me tinkin' dat dis one be perfect for dem rogues. It got pertty decent proc. 40% slow is quite nice. Plus da stat modifiers be very impressive, coupled wit decent dmg/dly dis be a real nice weapon. Da +8 dex must help wit da proc'ing me tink. Well, me hope ta see dis whip in action soon. QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2001 at 6:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
Unfortunately, that isn't the case. I have one on my bard, & it's primary hand only, so not too many rogues would use it, not being able to backstab & all.

It's not a bad proc @ all, it hits fast, & adds nice stats, but it still isn't too great of a dmg/dly ratio. As soon as i find the money, or a lucky loot, i plan to retire this whip to my bank.
